hero.name: Alex Developer
hero.tagline: Building scalable and performant web applications.

about.description: I am a passionate Full Stack Engineer with over 5 years of experience in building modern web applications. I specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Cloud Infrastructure. I love creating performant, scalable, and user-friendly digital products.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A fully functional e-commerce platform built with Next.js, Stripe integration, and a custom CMS.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A drag-and-drop task management tool with real-time updates.

experience.description: Led the frontend team in migrating legacy React app to Next.js. Improved performance scores by 40%.
Developed and maintained multiple client projects using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect
achievements.description: Earned the AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate certification.

achievements.title: Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: First place at Global Tech Hackathon for building an accessibility tool.
